description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with prominent wooden beams and decorative carved details, evoking a rustic, Nordic or fantasy-inspired style. The front facade includes a small, arched wooden door framed by thick timber posts and a circular window with a cross muntin above the entry. The exterior walls are constructed from dark stone blocks, providing a sturdy and weathered appearance, while the roof is covered in overlapping blue-gray shingles. The sides and rear of the house are simpler, with the same stone and wood construction, and the base is lined with large, rounded stones. The overall structure is compact, single-story, and appears well-suited for a small residential dwelling in a village or rural neighborhood. The craftsmanship and stylized details suggest a hand-built, storybook quality.
description: A compact, rustic house with a steep gable roof, timber beams, stone walls, and a small arched wooden door. Decorative woodwork and a circular window add to its Nordic or fantasy-inspired charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched wooden door, circular window, and ornate timber framing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue-gray shingled roof and stone base, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain stone wall, timber beams, and absence of entryways or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the shingled roof and stone base.
attribute_window_arrangement: single circular window above entry, no side or rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door framed by thick timber posts, decorative woodwork, and a small overhang
